subject: A massive elderly green-skinned figure seated in robes, arms resting on armrests, rendered in a formal audience pose
suspected_ip: Grand Elder Guru (Dragon Ball Z — Namek Saga)
description: An extremely large, corpulent elder figure with green skin dominates the frame. The figure is seated in a formal posture, arms resting heavily on the armrests of a seat. The figure wears layered robes in white and red, with a distinctive tall cranial structure characteristic of Namekian elders. The composition is a mid-shot to close-up, with the figure's bulk filling most of the frame. The background suggests an interior space rendered in pale neutral tones. The overall mood is solemn and dignified, projecting authority and age. No weapons or aggressive posture — this is a figure of wisdom and dispensation.
foreground: enormous elderly green-skinned robed figure seated on a throne-like seat
emotion: solemn, benevolent authority — resting pose projects calm command
